# K-Worship

> K-Worship is an all-in-one worship team management platform for Korean churches and worship leaders.

## Overview

K-Worship (케이워십) is a comprehensive worship planning and team collaboration platform designed specifically for Korean churches and worship teams worldwide. It streamlines the entire worship preparation process from song management to service execution.

## What is K-Worship?

K-Worship helps worship leaders and church worship teams:
- Manage comprehensive song libraries with lyrics, sheet music, and YouTube references
- Create and organize worship sets (setlists/콘티) with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface
- Collaborate in real-time with worship team members
- Share setlists with band members via public links
- Play worship sets as playlists during rehearsals
- Print sheet music and service orders with one click

## Key Features

### Song Library (곡 라이브러리)
- Centralized database for all worship songs
- Store lyrics, sheet music images, YouTube reference videos
- Track song usage history across services
- Organize with tags and categories
- Favorite songs for quick access

### Set Builder (세트 빌더)
- Drag-and-drop worship set creation
- Add songs, prayers, scripture readings, announcements
- Transpose keys for each song
- Add notes and instructions for team members
- Save as templates for recurring services

### Team Collaboration (팀 협업)
- Create multiple worship communities
- Invite and manage team members
- Role-based permissions (Owner, Leader, Member)
- Real-time sync across all devices
- In-app chat for team communication

### Band View (밴드 뷰)
- Clean, distraction-free view for worship team
- Fullscreen sheet music with pinch-to-zoom
- View without login via share links
- Perfect for tablets during rehearsals and services

### Music Player (뮤직 플레이어)
- Play worship sets as YouTube playlists
- Listen to reference tracks during preparation
- Seamless integration with song library

### Print Features (인쇄 기능)
- One-click sheet music printing
- Service order printing
- Customizable print options

### Recurring Templates (반복 템플릿)
- Create templates for regular services
- Auto-generate worship sets on schedule
- Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly patterns

## Target Users

- **Worship Leaders (예배 인도자)**: Plan services, manage songs, lead teams
- **Church Worship Teams (교회 찬양팀)**: Collaborate on setlists, access sheet music
- **Musicians and Vocalists**: View set orders, access charts during services
- **Korean Churches Worldwide**: Bilingual support (Korean/English)

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Web application (PWA-ready)
- **Languages**: Korean (Primary), English
- **Pricing**: Free tier available, Premium features for advanced needs
- **Authentication**: Email-based signup with social options

## Links

- **Website**: https://kworship.app
- **Features**: https://kworship.app/features
- **Sign Up**: https://kworship.app/signup
- **Login**: https://kworship.app/login
- **Help Center**: https://kworship.app/help

## Common Questions

**Q: What is K-Worship?**
A: K-Worship is a worship team management platform that helps churches organize songs, create service setlists, and collaborate with worship team members.

**Q: Is K-Worship free?**
A: Yes, K-Worship offers a free tier with core features. Premium features are available for advanced users and larger teams.

**Q: What languages does K-Worship support?**
A: K-Worship supports Korean and English, with the interface available in both languages.

**Q: Can I share setlists with my band?**
A: Yes, you can generate public share links that allow band members to view setlists without needing to log in.

**Q: Does K-Worship work on mobile devices?**
A: Yes, K-Worship is a responsive web application that works on phones, tablets, and desktops.

## Contact

- **Email**: hello@kworship.app
- **Support**: Available through the Help Center at https://kworship.app/help
